title: 8 Herbal Teas For Upper Abdominal Pain
description: Foeniculum vulgare teas contains compounds like estragole, limonene, and sesquiterpenes, which have anti-inflammatory and carminative properties. These compounds help reduce inflammation in the digestive tract, ease cramps, and relieve spasms, making Foeniculum vulgare teas a potential remedy for upper abdominal pain.
